ansh:
ANSHUL RAWAT 
Full Stack Developer | +91 9953540593 | anshulrawat5124@gmail.com | Faridabad, Haryana | linkedin.com/in/anshul-rawat 
SUMMARY 
Full Stack Developer with 5 months of hands-on industry experience delivering production-grade web applications. Strong expertise in 
React.js, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, and React Router, with backend development in Python and FastAPI. 
Experienced in optimizing PostgreSQL and MySQL databases, containerizing services with Docker, and working in Agile, CI/CD-driven 
environments. Focused on building clean, scalable, and measurable solutions. 
TECHNICAL SKILLS 
Frontend: React.js, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Responsive Design, Component-Driven UI, React Router 
Backend: Python, FastAPI, REST APIs, LangChain (basic) 
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL 
DevOps & Tools: Docker, Git, GitHub, Vite, CI/CD (basic), Redis (basic) 
Monitoring & Infra: Grafana (basic dashboards), Prometheus (basic metrics), Kibana (log analysis), PgBouncer 
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE 
SGSN Associates Pvt. Ltd., Rishikesh — Full Stack Developer Intern (Aug 2025 – Nov 2025) 
• Delivered 3 production-ready web applications using React.js and Tailwind CSS with modular, component-driven architecture. 
• Built a reusable library of 15+ React components, reducing development time for new pages by ~30%. 
• Converted Figma designs into pixel-perfect, fully responsive interfaces with consistent cross-device behavior. 
• Developed RESTful APIs using Python and FastAPI, supporting dynamic frontend features and secure data flow. 
• Optimized PostgreSQL and MySQL queries using indexing and schema refinement, improving data retrieval time by ~20%. 
• Containerized backend services using Docker, ensuring consistent local and deployment environments. 
• Configured basic monitoring dashboards using Grafana and log analysis with Kibana to track application health. 
• Actively participated in Agile ceremonies including sprint planning, reviews, and deployments. 
Interpe, Dehradun — Frontend Developer Intern (Sep 2023 – Nov 2023) 
• Developed responsive user interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript, improving page load performance. 
• Partnered with UI/UX designers to translate Figma mockups into code with near 100% visual accuracy. 
• Implemented basic unit testing scripts to validate UI stability and reduce regression issues. 
• Improved frontend structure through reusable components, modular CSS, and optimized DOM manipulation. 
PROJECTS 
Tax Bar Association Website: React + FastAPI application with reusable layouts, routing, and secure API integration; implemented 
validation and error handling for forms and dynamic content. 
FastAPI Web Accelerator: High-performance backend using async FastAPI; applied Redis caching and query optimization to reduce 
response latency under load. 
SwipeNRise (Live): Fully responsive React website with Tailwind CSS and optimized Vite build — https://swipenrise.com 
Snake Game: JavaScript-based browser game using requestAnimationFrame with collision detection and optimized rendering. 
EDUCATION 
Uttaranchal University, Dehradun — B.Tech in Computer Science (Aug 2020 – Jun 2024) 
Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, DBMS, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, Software Engineering. 
Govt. Model Sanskriti Senior Secondary School, Faridabad — Higher Secondary Education (Aug 2018 – Jun 2020) 
CERTIFICATION 
React JS Certification — Scalar
